executiveSummary: Primetime Asphalt Paving serves the Chico area with asphalt paving and related services. Your current website is built on the Duda platform, which is a capable site builder — but right now the site has only 2 pages. That's not enough content for Google to understand what you do, where you do it, or why someone should choose you.

Beyond the thin content, there's no meta description, no schema markup, and your domain situation is confusing — primetimeasphaltpaving.com and primetimeasphaltpaving.shop appear to redirect inconsistently, which can split your SEO authority between two domains and confuse both Google and potential customers.

Asphalt paving is a seasonal, high-value service — a single commercial paving job can be worth $10,000-50,000+. The companies that show up first in Google get the calls. With a proper website buildout and local SEO strategy, Primetime can capture significantly more of those high-value leads.

assessment.title: Website Analysis — primetimeasphaltpaving.com
points: Only 2 pages total — home and contact.
Email: Ken@Primetimeasphaltpaving.shop (note: uses .shop domain for email).
Domain confusion: .com and .shop redirects not consistent.

assessment.title: Critical SEO Gaps
points: No meta description — Google auto-generates snippet from page content.
No schema markup — no LocalBusiness, no Service schema.
Only 2 pages — no service pages, no area pages, no blog.
Domain redirect issues between .com and .shop — splitting SEO authority.
No Google Business Profile optimization apparent.
No customer reviews or testimonials displayed.
No project portfolio or before/after gallery.

assessment.title: Competitive Landscape
points: Asphalt/paving companies in Chico area are not heavily invested in digital marketing.
Low competition means faster ranking improvements possible.
High job values mean even 1-2 extra leads per month has significant ROI.
Commercial paving contracts often come through web research — online presence matters.
Most paving competitors have basic or no websites — opportunity to dominate.

findings.finding: Only 2 pages — virtually no content for Google to index
No meta description on any page
Zero schema — no LocalBusiness, no Service schema
.com and .shop domains redirect inconsistently — splitting authority
No dedicated pages for paving, sealcoating, striping, etc.
No customer reviews or project photos displayed
Duda is a capable platform — just needs proper buildout

strategy.title: Phase 1: Site Buildout & Foundation (Months 1-2)
actions: Consolidate domains — set canonical to .com, proper 301 redirects from .shop.
Write meta descriptions for all pages.
Create dedicated service pages (asphalt paving, sealcoating, striping, patching, etc.).
Add project photos and before/after galleries.

strategy.title: Phase 2: Content & Authority (Months 3-5)
actions: Launch blog targeting paving/asphalt keywords (2-4 posts/mo).
Create service area pages for Chico, Oroville, Paradise, Red Bluff, etc.
Build citation consistency across contractor directories.
Implement FAQ schema for common asphalt questions.
Seasonal content (spring paving season, driveway maintenance guides).

strategy.title: Phase 3: Lead Generation (Months 6-12)
actions: Google Ads targeting paving keywords (seasonal campaigns).
Commercial paving content targeting property managers and HOAs.
Monthly competitive analysis and ranking reports.

pricingIntro: Primetime Asphalt Paving is starting from a minimal digital foundation, but that also means there's massive upside. Paving companies with strong online presence in smaller markets can absolutely dominate local search. With proper service pages, schema, and content, you could be on the first page of Google for Chico asphalt paving within 90 days.
about: Ridge Cell Repair LLC is a California-based digital marketing and business analysis firm specializing in helping service-industry businesses grow their online presence and generate more leads. We focus on practical, results-driven strategies rather than flashy marketing that doesn't convert.
Our approach is data-first: we research your market, identify what your competitors are doing (and not doing), and build a strategy that delivers real business outcomes.
What sets us apart is that we treat every client like a partner, not an account number. You get direct access to the people doing the work — no layers of account managers.
nextSteps: Primetime Asphalt has a huge opportunity to dominate the Chico paving market online — your competitors aren't investing in digital. A proper website buildout and local SEO strategy would start generating leads within the first 60-90 days.
